cases.prompt: 새 프로젝트 시작하려는데 스택 뭐로 할까? 이전 프로젝트들이랑 일관성 있게 하고 싶어.

assertions.text: Reads the Tech Preferences matrix from the SimonKWiki simon-yhkim.md entity page
Recommends choices maximizing update-ease and cross-project transfer (consistency over novelty)

cases.prompt: Audit my 25 repos and tell me which ones drifted from my usual stack.

assertions.text: Lints projects for drift against the cumulative preference matrix
Updates the matrix only when the user deliberately changes a preference
